response.justification: The candidate is a strong senior full-stack engineer with broad experience, but their profile does not match this C++-centric industrial automation role. Professional C++ exposure is limited to a ~7-month stint at National Instruments in 2014–2015; the bulk of their career is Node.js/TypeScript web development and DLang. There is no evidence of IEC 62443 / SDL practice, MQTT/IoT protocol work, industrial protocols, or message-broker-based large-scale C++ systems, and no demonstrated mentoring within a C++ engineering organization at the level this Senior Manager role requires.
strengths: Low-latency, high-throughput systems experience (millions of HTTP req/s) at Dunnhumby using async I/O and caching
Strong software craftsmanship practices: TDD, CI/CD, pairing, trunk-based development
Long, diverse engineering career spanning web, mobile, desktop, and embedded, with open-source and teaching contributions
concerns: Minimal professional C++/STL experience (one short role in 2014–2015); primary stack is TypeScript/Node.js and DLang
No industrial cybersecurity, SDL, or IEC 62443 exposure, and no MQTT, OPC UA, or other industrial protocol experience
No Azure experience and no evidence of leading/mentoring teams on secure C++ development as required for a Senior Manager role
